title: orchis ustulata var. ecalcarata
intro: Orchis ustulata var. ecalcarata, also known as the yellow-hooded orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Asphodeloideae subfamily. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine for its purported anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Orchis ustulata var. ecalcarata include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis, and its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the roots and tubers, which can then be used in infusions, decoctions, or as a topical application.
